message:
build: Link system libbz2 and liblzma (same as CPython)

Added compression library linkage to runtime module:
- runtime.linkSystemLibrary("bz2", .{})
- runtime.linkSystemLibrary("lzma", .{})

This matches CPython's approach:
- CPython's Modules/_bz2module.c links against libbz2 (bzlib.h)
- CPython's Modules/_lzmamodule.c links against liblzma (lzma.h)

System libraries detected:
- libbz2: 1.0.8
- liblzma: 5.8.1

Build tested successfully with ReleaseFast.
